contentfulTextarea.textContent:
about me

i am an artist-at-heart, a taurus, and a master's student at NYU's Interactive Telecommunications Program, graduating spring 2020. previously, i worked as a product designer at Codecademy and Girls Who Code, and studied computer science at MIT. i'm particularly interested in the potential for design and art to interrogate computing culture and radically reimagine how it can be more equitable. as a designer who's worked in ed-tech, i worked to transform gate-keeped fields, like programming, to be more accessible, inclusive, and human. as an artist, i'm interested in co-opting technological processes to carve a space for radical vulnerability and sensitivity in a world that does not traditionally bring justice to these values. i'm open to part-time, contract, and full-time work after graduating. please send me a message if you'd like to collaborate!
view my résumé



### exhibition - __[Computer Mouse Conference](https://www.computermouseconference.net/ "Computer Mouse Conference site")__, [CURSORWORLD](https://jackieis.online/projects/cursorworld "CURSORWORLD portfolio page") · participatory art exhibit · November 2019 - __[PRIMER19](https://webcache.googleusercontent.com/search?q=cache:yTAwUbX84MIJ:https://2019.primerconference.us/exhibition+&cd=14&hl=en&ct=clnk&gl=us "PRIMER 19 Exhibition Website")__, [ENIAC Girlz](https://jackieis.online/projects/eniac-girlz/ "ENIAC Girlz project page") · poster presentation · July 2019 - __[ NYU ITP Spring Show](https://itp.nyu.edu/shows/spring2019/ "NYU ITP Spring Show")__, [ENIAC Girlz](https://jackieis.online/projects/eniac-girlz/ "ENIAC Girlz project page") · speculative design · May 2019 - __[NYU ITP Fall Show](https://itp.nyu.edu/shows/winter2018/ "NYU ITP Fall Show")__, The Body Pillow · speculative design · December 2018 - __Museum of the Moving Image__, [a collaboration w/ my 12-year-old self](https://jackieis.online/projects/collaboration-with-12-year-old-self "a collaboration w/ my 12-year-old self project page") · performance · December 2018 ### speaking - __[Tech for Social Good Day](https://techforsocialgood.rocks/ "Tech for Social Good Day site")__, "Dark/Net/Art: an Introduction to Self-Publishing with Tor" · workshop w/ [Cezar Mocan](https://cezar.io "Cezar Mocan") · February 2020 - __BUFU WYFY School__, "Website Design as Personal Storytelling" · workshop · August 2019 ### awards - __AniMIThon Winner__, [backspace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_lODuMKc7QQ "backspace Youtube link") · animated film · May 2018 - __[MIT Anthropology James Howe Prize](https://anthropology.mit.edu/undergraduate/howeprize "MIT Anthropology James Howe Prize")__, "Clashing Colors, Blinking Backgrounds, Under-Construction Signs: GeoCities’ Aesthetic Legacy and the Future of Web Culture" · essay · May 2018
